file_insights.purpose: Primary widget implementation for horizontal kanban layout
file_insights.patterns: ratatui widget trait, Layout-based column division, ListState for focus management
State machine with mode tracking, filesystem card reading integration

file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive specification document for full TUI implementation
file_insights.patterns: Detailed specification with status tracking, dependency graph across phases

patterns_discovered.name: Ratatui Layout Strategy
patterns_discovered.description: Use Layout::horizontal to divide body width equally among non-collapsed columns; collapsed columns render as 3-char dividers with state glyph only
patterns_discovered.usage: KanbanWidget renders kanban board columns with dynamic width allocation

patterns_discovered.name: RAII Terminal Guard
patterns_discovered.description: TerminalGuard struct manages alternate screen, raw mode, and panic hook restoration via Drop trait
patterns_discovered.usage: Ensures terminal cleanup on panic or normal exit; decouples setup/cleanup logic

patterns_discovered.name: Event-Driven Architecture
patterns_discovered.description: Three concurrent background tasks (crossterm reader, tick timer, filesystem watcher) send events through tokio::sync::mpsc unbounded channel
patterns_discovered.usage: Enables responsive async TUI with filesystem change detection

patterns_discovered.name: Mode-Based State Machine
patterns_discovered.description: App::mode field (Normal, Filter, ActionPopup, Detail, LogTail, NewCard, Subshell) controls rendering and input handling
patterns_discovered.usage: Context-sensitive keybinding hints, overlay rendering, input filtering per mode

patterns_discovered.name: Three-Zone Vertical Layout
patterns_discovered.description: Header (2 rows) + Body (fill) + Footer (1 row) via Layout::vertical
patterns_discovered.usage: Separates concerns: status/provider info, main kanban view, keybinding hints

patterns_discovered.name: Collapsed Column Glyph Logic
patterns_discovered.description: Empty columns (0 cards) render as narrow 3-char dividers with state glyph (·, ⚙, ✓, ✗, ~)
patterns_discovered.usage: Reduces visual clutter while maintaining state visibility; columns expand on new card arrival

patterns_discovered.name: WIP Limit Color Coding
patterns_discovered.description: Running column shows count ratio (N/M); amber at >=75%, red at 100%
patterns_discovered.usage: Visual feedback for workflow bottleneck; yellow-bordered focused column

patterns_discovered.name: Card Row Format Strategy
patterns_discovered.description: Single-line format: glyph + id/title + provider + elapsed; Running cards use two-line format with progress bar + phase
patterns_discovered.usage: Density-efficient display; distinguishes running work from queued/completed

gotchas_discovered.issue: Terminal requires real TTY for crossterm
gotchas_discovered.context: Pipe-based verification returns 'Device not configured' in non-interactive context
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Accept TTY-only verification; cannot test rendering via pipes

gotchas_discovered.issue: Running cards require two-line rendering with progress bar
gotchas_discovered.context: Adds layout complexity compared to single-line queued/completed cards
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Separate render logic for running vs non-running cards in KanbanWidget

gotchas_discovered.issue: WIP limits read from providers.json config; must be consistent with dispatcher
gotchas_discovered.context: Mismatch between TUI display and actual limits causes confusion
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure providers.json is canonical; read once per refresh event

gotchas_discovered.issue: Column width allocation must handle integer rounding with odd widths
gotchas_discovered.context: Layout::horizontal divide may not distribute exactly with odd terminal widths
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Assign extra space to leftmost columns; handle 4-column case with widths like [40,40,40,41]

gotchas_discovered.issue: ListState focus tracking requires coordination with column navigation
gotchas_discovered.context: Switching columns (h/l) must preserve per-column ListState, not reset selection
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Store ListState per KanbanColumn; restore on col_focus change

recommendations.rationale: h/l/j/k navigation is core UX; must wire before overlays
TUI must reflect dispatcher filesystem changes in real-time

recommendations.task: Add snapshot tests for KanbanWidget rendering
recommendations.rationale: Ratatui widgets render to Frame; use insta for visual regression testing

recommendations.task: Profile column width calculation for large terminal (>200 cols)
recommendations.rationale: 5+ columns with equal width may waste space; consider responsive breakpoints
recommendations.approach: If width > 200 and columns <= 3, allocate wider; if >= 4, narrow dividers

recommendations.task: Add integration test: kanban renders all 5 states with varying card counts
recommendations.rationale: Verify collapse logic, WIP display, focused border, elapsed time formatting

recommendations.task: Optimize ListState updates to avoid full re-renders
recommendations.rationale: Reduce flicker on j/k within large columns (100+ cards)
recommendations.approach: Lazy ListState::scroll_down/up instead of recreating selection
